name: DLRADAPT_f
description: Discrete Linear Adaptive System - represents a discrete-time linear system with adaptive parameters
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock interfaceFunctionName="DLRADAPT_f" blockType="d" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="dlradp" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="DLRADAPT_f">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="6" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="[0;1]"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="[]"/>
    <data line="2" column="0" value="[0.2+%i*0.8,0.2-%i*0.8;0.3+%i*0.7,0.3-%i*0.7]"/>
    <data line="3" column="0" value="[1;1]"/>
    <data line="4" column="0" value="[]"/>
    <data line="5" column="0" value="[0;0]"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Uses complex numbers in exprs for adaptive poles/zeros
Simulation function dlradp is DEFAULT type
criticalRules: Depends on both U and event clock
